M-075.NAME: premium-user-cabinet
M-075.path: frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend/src/components/SubscriptionPanel.tsx frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend/src/pages/Config.tsx frontend/src/pages/Subscription.tsx frontend/src/pages/Referrals.tsx frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx frontend/src/i18n/index.ts docs/plans/Phase-57.xml docs/plans/Phase-59.xml docs/plans/Phase-62.xml docs/plans/Phase-68.xml docs/plans/Phase-69.xml docs/plans/Phase-70.xml docs/plans/Phase-71.xml docs/plans/Phase-72.xml docs/plans/Phase-73.xml scripts/phase57-premium-user-cabinet-smoke.mjs scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs scripts/phase62-compactness-deletion-smoke.mjs scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs scripts/phase69-referral-bonus-smoke.mjs scripts/phase70-config-qr-parity-smoke.mjs scripts/phase71-device-config-master-detail-smoke.mjs scripts/phase72-user-auth-navigation-smoke.mjs scripts/phase73-config-amnezia-qr-smoke.mjs
M-075.owns: Premium compact personal cabinet for VPN, MTProto, subscription, devices, referrals, and settings.
M-075.purpose: Turn the user cabinet into a compact premium command center without hiding core actions.

exports.view-premium-user-home: First-screen VPN state, config action, subscription countdown, and MTProto access.
exports.view-premium-config: QR, download, copy, and device workflow with compact premium controls and no visible raw-config diagnostics panels.
exports.view-device-master-detail-config: Master-detail config page where any existing device can be selected and exported through QR, .conf, or Copy without rotation.
exports.view-device-config-amnezia-truthfulness: Config page shows AmneziaWG QR only as the proven QR path and guides AmneziaVPN users to selected-device .conf import.
exports.view-premium-subscription: Tariff, countdown, calendar, and renewal flow with server-derived data.
exports.view-phase72-auth-navigation: Russian invalid-login UX, Settings without language selector, desktop logout under Settings, bottom dock navigation, and compact desktop subscription calendar.
exports.view-phase77-subscription-mobile-polish: Active-until subscription copy, clickable config guidance, role-colored subscription calendar markers, and fixed mobile bottom navigation.
exports.rule-user-deletion-audit: Remove duplicated, bulky, decorative, or non-actionable user-cabinet content.

constraints.constraint-1: VPN config and subscription actions must remain reachable within one or two taps on phone.
constraints.constraint-2: Owner-only MTProto secrets and links must remain redacted from logs and unavailable to other users.
constraints.constraint-3: No backend API, deploy, install, billing, VPN, or MTProto runtime behavior changes are included.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: Frontend build and premium user smoke passed on 2026-06-03.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Static route proof and CSS guards cover compact first screen, no legacy route redirects, and no horizontal scroll primitives; authenticated screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Phase-62 folded secondary dashboard diagnostics, config guidance/diagnostics, subscription feature copy, and public-adjacent low-value copy while preserving primary workflows.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: Phase-59 added copy/download/MTProto feedback and status transition classes while preserving Phase-57 workflows.
acceptance-metrics.metric-5: Phase-68 makes /dashboard the MTProto-first surface with subscription/tariffs/calendar embedded below it and keeps /dashboard/subscription route-compatible.
acceptance-metrics.metric-6: Phase-69 renders recent referral rows with masked referred identity instead of generic "Реферал #N".
acceptance-metrics.metric-7: Phase-70 keeps /dashboard/config compact while rendering a lighter payload-identical QR and preserving QR/download/copy/device actions.
acceptance-metrics.metric-8: Phase-71 makes existing-device QR/.conf/Copy retrieval available through compact master-detail UX without forced rotation.
acceptance-metrics.metric-9: Phase-72 keeps logout visible under Settings, removes language controls, and keeps mobile dock/calendar compact without backend/deploy/admin drift.
acceptance-metrics.metric-10: Phase-73 keeps /dashboard/config KPN copy truthful, removes unsupported AmneziaVPN QR advertising, preserves selected-device AmneziaWG QR/.conf/Copy, and shows tariff-aware limit copy.
acceptance-metrics.metric-11: Config export actions render without the extra dark frame, and mobile copy action text remains on one line.

phase-71-executed-scope.primary-files: frontend/src/pages/Config.tsx frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend/src/components/SubscriptionPanel.tsx frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx frontend/src/lib/api.ts frontend/src/i18n/index.ts frontend/src/index.css scripts/phase71-device-config-master-detail-smoke.mjs
phase-71-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Rework /dashboard/config into compact master-detail device UX, move destructive actions into confirmation-safe secondary controls, fix QR modal close/icon copy, adjust sidebar logout order, remove requested helper copy, and complete user-cabinet i18n cleanup.
phase-71-executed-scope.acceptance: Desktop and mobile users with up to 9 devices can select any device and access QR/.conf/Copy in one focused detail surface without raw diagnostics or long awkward scrolling.

M-075.evidence: 2026-06-03: Phase-57 added protected user command center, /dashboard/* primary actions, compact config/subscription/referral/settings surfaces, Phase-57 smoke, frontend build, Phase-45/46/48/50/52/53/55/56 regression smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard. 2026-06-04: Phase-59 added bounded copy/download/proxy feedback and status motion; frontend build, Phase-59 smoke, Phase-57 regression smoke, and post-commit Phase-58 regression smoke passed. 2026-06-04: Phase-62 compactness/deletion smoke, frontend build, Phase-57/56/61/60 regressions, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed after folded secondary user/public surfaces were added. 2026-06-04: Phase-68 removed dashboard command center/secondary fold, introduced shared SubscriptionPanel, removed visible config raw/diagnostics, updated smokes, and passed frontend/admin builds plus regression gates. 2026-06-04: Phase-69 updated Referrals history rows with masked referred identity and passed frontend build plus Phase-69/57 smokes. 2026-06-04: Phase-70 retuned Config.tsx QR canvas to level M with margin, added QR parity markers, preserved compact config workflow, and passed Phase-70/57/62 smokes.
M-075.phase-71-evidence: Frontend build and Phase-71 smoke passed for compact device master-detail, selected-device QR/.conf/Copy, secondary destructive actions, QR close icon, label/copy removals, settings i18n, and Phase-62 collapse marker preservation.

phase-72-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Preserve premium user cabinet workflows while applying Russian login error text, Settings language deletion, logout under Settings, mobile bottom dock, and compact subscription calendar.
phase-72-executed-scope.acceptance: Frontend build, Phase-72 smoke, Phase-57 regression, Phase-61 responsive, Phase-68 dashboard, Phase-71 master-detail, session, and motion smokes passed locally.

M-075.phase-72-evidence: Premium user cabinet passed local Phase-72 verification with no backend/admin/deploy/runtime source drift.

phase-73-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Replace visible config title with KPN copy, remove the selected-device helper sentence, keep selected-device AmneziaWG QR/.conf/Copy, hide unsupported AmneziaVPN QR scan path, add AmneziaVPN .conf import guidance, and show current tariff name in the device-limit exhausted message.
phase-73-executed-scope.acceptance: Phase-73 smoke rejects AmneziaVPN QR advertising and verifies KPN copy, AmneziaWG QR, .conf guidance, display-only tariff copy, and protected backend/deploy/runtime/admin guard.

M-075.phase-73-evidence: Frontend source and static smoke passed locally for Phase-73; final build/regression suite recorded in V-M-075 after execution.
M-075.hotspot: H-062: Premium user cabinet must keep VPN config, subscription, MTProto, and device actions reachable in one or two taps.

phase-77-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Subscription card and calendar polish were added without reintroducing bulky helper panels; mobile dock remains visible while preserving one/two-tap route access.
phase-77-executed-scope.acceptance: Phase-57, Phase-68, and Phase-77 smokes passed for premium user cabinet workflow preservation.

M-075.phase-77-evidence: Premium user cabinet passed local Phase-77 verification.

mobile-scroll-dock-fix.primary-behaviors: Premium cabinet keeps MTProto secret readable without trapping page scroll, and the mobile route menu stays fixed at the viewport bottom after navigation.
mobile-scroll-dock-fix.acceptance: Phase-77 smoke now guards the secret scroll class, viewport-fixed dock marker, and mobile route-transform shutdown.

config-action-polish-fix.primary-behaviors: /dashboard/config export actions keep QR, .conf, and Copy reachable while removing the extra dark frame around the action group and preventing the mobile "Копировать конфиг" label from wrapping.
config-action-polish-fix.acceptance: Phase-71 smoke now asserts frameless export-action markers and mobile nowrap copy-action markers without backend, deploy, runtime, or API changes.
